task_completion.description: The bcWebCam application is opened and visible on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window appears in the screenshots.

task_completion.description: The 'Always on Top' window mode is enabled in the bcWebCam interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, pin icon, or menu item for 'Always on Top' (or similar wording) is visibly checked or activated in the bcWebCam UI.

task_completion.description: The continuous/auto-scan mode is enabled in the bcWebCam interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, toggle, or button for continuous scanning, auto-scan, or a timer is visibly active or checked in the bcWebCam UI.

task_completion.description: The bcWebCam application remains running and visible on the screen at the end of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the bcWebCam application open on the desktop.

task_completion.description: The bcWebCam window is fully visible and not obscured by other applications, demonstrating it is visible as requested.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshot, the bcWebCam window is fully visible and not covered by other application windows.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the bcWebCam graphical interface to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show cursor movements and clicks within the bcWebCam UI, rather than terminal commands or scripts being used to modify configuration files.

integrity.description: The application being configured is the actual bcWebCam software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown belongs to bcWebCam, not a text editor, mock application, or web browser displaying the task description.

integrity.description: The settings are visibly toggled in the application's UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually clicks and enables the settings in the UI, rather than just searching for the terms or typing them into a text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task explicitly requires enabling 'Always on Top' and 'continuous/auto-scan mode' via the bcWebCam UI. Verify that both settings are visibly active in the application's interface.
